text:
The is the Titan form of Eren.

Abilities

The most notable ability of the Mysterious Titan is the heightened display of fighting prowess; this is shown several times while fighting against mindless Titans and the White Titan.

Story

Attack on Titan, The Movie: Part 1

Eren gained the power after his father injected him with the Jaeger serum when he was conducting a secret experiment. He held the power without knowing for several years, transforming for the first time after being eaten by a Titan.

Attack on Titan, The Movie: Part 2
